title: Taxonomic Classification for Botanical Research
scenario: Develop a prompt to classify a set of plant species into a hierarchical taxonomy consisting of three levels: kingdom, phylum, and class. The classification should be based on specific botanical features and characteristics of each species. Assume the species are in JSON format and contain a mix of standard and custom attributes. The target LLM output should be a JSON object with the classified species at each level.
constraints: Must use a JSON-based classification library such as jsonschema
Must handle cases where a species belongs to multiple kingdoms

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the taxonomy classification using a testing dataset
Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
